Serialized Form

Package umm.digiquilt.animation

Class umm.digiquilt.animation.AnimationPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

state

String state
The current animation state of this panel. Can be "stopped" or "forward".

percent

float percent
The percentage through the current animation.

sprites

List<E> sprites
List of Sprites that have been added.

timer

PercentageTimer timer
The timer that tells how much of the animation has passed and pokes us to refresh the image

Class umm.digiquilt.animation.PercentageTimer extends Timer implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

numSteps

int numSteps
The number of frames to show

stepsTaken

int stepsTaken
The number of frames that have been shown

direction

int direction
The direction to move in. 1 is forward (0% to 100%), and -1 is backward (100% to 0%)

Package umm.digiquilt.control

Class umm.digiquilt.control.LoadBlockAction extends AbstractAction implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

blockWorks

BlockWorks blockWorks
The BlockWorks instance to load into.

defaultDirectory

File defaultDirectory
The starting directory for the file loader.

selectedFile

File selectedFile
The file which should be selected when the chooser first pops up. This could be null if one isn't specified.

handler

SaveHandler handler
The SaveHandler, which does synchronization before we load.

challenges

ComboBoxModel challenges
Access to the list of current challenges

Class umm.digiquilt.control.LoadPatchAction extends AbstractAction implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

defaultDirectory

File defaultDirectory
The starting directory for the file loader.

selectedFile

File selectedFile
The file which should be selected when the chooser first pops up. This could be null if one isn't specified.

handler

SaveHandler handler
The SaveHandler, which does synchronization before we load.

patchViewer

PatchViewer patchViewer
The Patchworks that the loaded patch is sent to.

challenges

ComboBoxModel challenges
Access to the list of current challenges

Package umm.digiquilt.view

Class umm.digiquilt.view.BlockSizePanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

Class umm.digiquilt.view.BlockViewer extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

patchSize

int patchSize
The size of one side of a patch, in pixels.

constraints

GridBagConstraints constraints
Gridbag component constraints.

patchViewers

PatchViewer[] patchViewers
Array of all the PatchViewers in this BlockViewer.

sideSize

int sideSize
The dimensions of the displayed block. In other words, the block should be sideSize by sideSize (in terms of patches).

blockViewer

InteractiveBlockViewer blockViewer
The BlockViewer that we made.

Grid gridLines
The grid currently being shown.

mySize

Dimension mySize
Our current preferred size.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.InteractiveBlockViewer extends BlockViewer implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

patchWorks

PatchWorks patchWorks
Access to the current Patch, if it is given. This will be null if a PatchWorks was not passed in to the constructor.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.LoadPatchPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

patchWorkViewer

PatchViewer patchWorkViewer
The PatchWorkViewer that this Panel holds.

rotater

RotationPanel rotater
A panel which shows rotation of patches with a neat animation.

patchSize

int patchSize
The size of a Patch, in pixels.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.PatchViewer extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

thePatch

Patch thePatch
Patch backend.

image

Image image
Image of the Patch to be displayed.

fullSize

int fullSize
The length of a side of a full sized Patch. In other words, a full square will be fullSize by fullSize, whereas a rectangle could be fullSize/2 by fullSize.

highlighted

boolean highlighted
Turn on or off highlighting when hovered over by the GlassPane. Defaults to true.

snappy

boolean snappy
Turn on or off shape snapping when hovered over by the GlassPane. Defaults to true.

isShadowed

boolean isShadowed
Boolean to decide whether transparency is completely invisible or shown with a semi-transparent shadow.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.ShapesPalette extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

fullSquareView

PatchViewer fullSquareView
PatchViewer for the full sized square shape

halfTriangleView

PatchViewer halfTriangleView
PatchViewer for the large triangle shape

halfRectView

PatchViewer halfRectView
PatchViewer for the rectangle shape

quarterTriangleView

PatchViewer quarterTriangleView
PatchViewer for the small triangle shape

quarterSquareView

PatchViewer quarterSquareView
PatchViewer for the small square shape

patchSize

int patchSize
The size that a patch should be, in pixels.

toggleButton

JButton toggleButton
Button to toggle the smaller shapes on and off

patchWorks

PatchWorks patchWorks
Access to the current Patch.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.WhatsHappeningPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

showing

List<E> showing
A list of all the BlockViewers that we're showing, in order from left to right

constraints

GridBagConstraints constraints
The GridBagConstraints, pre-set up for adding viewers

numToShow

int numToShow
The number of recent quilts to show.

blockWorks

BlockWorks blockWorks

handler

SaveHandler handler

challenges

ComboBoxModel challenges
Package umm.digiquilt.view.blockAnimation

Class umm.digiquilt.view.blockAnimation.BlockSorter extends AnimationPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

sideSize

int sideSize
The number of Patches per side, i.e. if the block being animated is 4 by 4, the blockSize is 4.

blockSize

int blockSize
The total number of Patches in the Block.

patchSize

int patchSize
The size of one Patch in the block

originalTiles

List<E> originalTiles
The original Tiles, which are sorted by color but contain their original information about location.

gridIndexOrder

List<E> gridIndexOrder
A list containing tile indices after analyzeGrid() is done. They conform to the Grid instead of to the regular block order.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.blockAnimation.QuiltSlideShow extends AnimationPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

blocks

List<E> blocks
The list of blocks to animate.

currentBlock

int currentBlock
The index of the block that we're currently animating as the starting block. This block is transforming into currentBlock+1 (unless it's at the end, in which case it's transforming back into the first block).

waiting

boolean waiting
Flag to hold all animation for a bit while a block is shown.

waitTimer

Timer waitTimer
Timer to wait between animations.

patchSize

int patchSize
The size of each Patch.

stopped

boolean stopped

Class umm.digiquilt.view.blockAnimation.UserSlideshow extends JDialog implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

top

JPanel top

middle

JPanel middle

bottom

JPanel bottom

slideShow

QuiltSlideShow slideShow

blocks

List<E> blocks

defaultDirectory

File defaultDirectory

Class umm.digiquilt.view.fabriccontrols.ReplaceAllColorPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

buttonSize

Dimension buttonSize
Default size for the buttons

wellOne

FabricWell wellOne
The FabricWell on the left

wellTwo

FabricWell wellTwo
The FabricWell on the right

blockWorks

BlockWorks blockWorks
Access to the current Block.

leftRightButton

JButton leftRightButton
The button to replace the left color with the right

swapButton

JButton swapButton
The button to swap the two colors.

rightLeftButton

JButton rightLeftButton
The button to replace the right color with the left

leftRightArrowIcon

TwoColorArrow leftRightArrowIcon
The arrow pictured on the left to right button.

swapArrowIcon

TwoColorArrow swapArrowIcon
The arrow pictured on the swap button.

rightLeftArrowIcon

TwoColorArrow rightLeftArrowIcon
The arrow pictured on the right to left button.

Package umm.digiquilt.view.filebrowser

Class umm.digiquilt.view.filebrowser.NotePanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

text

JTextArea text
Text area to display notes.

textscroll

JScrollPane textscroll
ScrollPane to contain the text area.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.filebrowser.PatchAccessory extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

notes

NotePanel notes
Panel to show the notes pulled from XML.

challenge

JLabel challenge
Label to show the challenge pulled from XML.

preview

JLabel preview
Label to show the loaded image of the selected quilt.

fileName

JLabel fileName
Label to show the file name.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.filebrowser.PatchFileChooser extends JFileChooser implements Serializable

Class umm.digiquilt.view.filebrowser.QuiltAccessory extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

notes

NotePanel notes
Panel to show the notes pulled from XML.

challenge

JLabel challenge
Label to show the challenge pulled from XML.

preview

JLabel preview
Label to show the loaded image of the selected quilt.

fileName

JLabel fileName
Label to show the file name.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.filebrowser.QuiltFileChooser extends JFileChooser implements Serializable

Class umm.digiquilt.view.filebrowser.SaveBrowser extends JDialog implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

blockWorks

BlockWorks blockWorks
Access to the current block, and its undo and redo stack.

grid

Grid grid
The grid to be saved.

handler

SaveHandler handler
This handles the actual act of saving the file. It knows if it should save to a server, or just locally, and does all the checking for file name conflicts and such for us.

notes

NotePanel notes
A note panel, to allow the user to input notes.

fileNameBox

JTextField fileNameBox
Text field to take in the name of the quilt, which will be used to decide on the file name.

blockLayeredPane

JLayeredPane blockLayeredPane
A layered pane, holding a view of the block with the grid on top of it. Provides a preview for the user, and is used to take the "snapshot" which will be used as a thumbnail when the file is loaded back.

currentChallenge

Challenge currentChallenge
The challenge that the user was working on at the time of the save.

exitStatus

int exitStatus
Indicates which button the user clicked to get rid of the dialog

promptList

JComboBox promptList
The drop down menu of prompts

Package umm.digiquilt.view.glasspane

Class umm.digiquilt.view.glasspane.HandGlassPane extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

hand

Image hand
The image of what shape/patch the hand is holding.

mousePoint

Point mousePoint
mousePoint is the x/y coordinates of the mouse on the frame.

handX

int handX
Used to center hand to the cursor

handY

int handY
Used to center hand to the cursor

avoidSnapping

boolean avoidSnapping
This switch lets us not snap immediately when a Patch is picked up. Kids were having a problem where they picked up a Patch and it immediately snapped back into place, thinking that they hadn't picked it up. When the glass pane is first turned on, it will set this to true and not snap even if the component that we're hovering over requests it. After the mouse moves to a new component, it will put this back to false and normal behavior will resume.

seenComponent

boolean seenComponent
This gets set to true when we first hover over a component, so we know when we're hovering over a new one later.

hoveringOver

Object hoveringOver
The mouse listener that the mouse was last hovering over. Gotten from eventDispatched(). It should be reset with resetHighlight() when the pane gets turned back on, or else an image will appear from the last time the pane was on until the mouse moves again.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.glasspane.LockingGlassPane extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

unlocked

List<E> unlocked
The list of components that shouldn't be blocked.

Package umm.digiquilt.view.grids

Class umm.digiquilt.view.grids.GridButton extends JButton implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

label

String label
The text displayed by this button. Defaults to an empty string.

lines

Grid lines
The grid being held by this button, which is painted on the button's face.

hasGrid

boolean hasGrid
Boolean to keep track of whether or not this GridButton has had a grid set yet, or if it's using the default grid. Is there a better way to do this?

size

Dimension size
The default size of this button.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.grids.GridButtonHighlightPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

leftSide

int leftSide
The button number on the left to be highlighted. Will be the only button highlighted on the left side.

rightSide

int rightSide
The buttons on the right to be highlighted. Unlike the left side, this will highlight all the buttons from the top up to and including this one.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.grids.GridButtonPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

buttons

List<E> buttons
List of all buttons on this panel. Others use this to find out where a button is located and highlight it if need be.

blockSize

int blockSize
A block size for this panel. This is so that division panels can have a specified block size that they are meant for.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.grids.GridSelectionPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

highlight

GridButtonHighlightPanel highlight
The highlight panel paints highlights around the GridButtons. Makes the same assumptions about the button's size and position.

currentPanel

JPanel currentPanel
The current, "pop up" panel being shown on the right side.

layer

JLayeredPane layer
Layered pane for all the panels. Doesn't have a layout manager, so things have to be placed and sized manually. But that's okay in this case because we want to be able to place things down to the pixel.

blockWorks

BlockWorks blockWorks
The BlockWorks that this selection panel will set the grid to.

leftPanels

List<E> leftPanels
List of all the left hand panels (division panels).

Package umm.digiquilt.view.ld

Class umm.digiquilt.view.ld.ChallengeWindow extends JFrame implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

directory

File directory
The directory to look into to find quilts.

quiltPanel

JPanel quiltPanel
The panel containing all the quilts that were found.

challenges

MutableComboBoxModel challenges

selector

ChallengePanel selector
The challenge panel.

worker

ChallengeWorkerThread worker
A separate thread to do the heavy lifting of scanning (potentially) lots of quilt files. That way, the GUI doesn't lock up while quilts are being loaded.

slideShow

QuiltSlideShow slideShow

autochangeTimer

Timer autochangeTimer
Timer which fires, signaling a move to a new challenge

Class umm.digiquilt.view.login.QuiltLogin extends JDialog implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

qz

QuiltZeroconf qz
Network access

quiltDirectory

File quiltDirectory
The directory for classes to be stored in

offlineClasses

List<E> offlineClasses
List of all the classes that are on disk. Even if they disappear from JmDNS, they should still be available for log in.

classBoxModel

umm.digiquilt.view.login.QuiltLogin.SortedComboBoxModel classBoxModel
The combo box containing the list of classes

nameComboBox

JComboBox nameComboBox
Combo box for names

loginButton

JButton loginButton
Log in button

userPressedButton

boolean userPressedButton
Flag to whether the Log in button was clicked or not

Package umm.digiquilt.view.server

Class umm.digiquilt.view.server.NameFileEditor extends JDialog implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

nameFile

File nameFile
The file being edited

textListView

JList textListView
The area where the user can edit the file.

textList

DefaultListModel textList
Model for the list of lines.

add

JButton add
The "Add" button to add a line

edit

JButton edit
The "Edit" button to edit a line

remove

JButton remove
The "Remove" button to delete a line

moveUp

JButton moveUp
The "Move Up" button to move a line up

moveDown

JButton moveDown
The "Move Down" button to move a line down

sort

JButton sort
The "Sort Alphabetically" to sort all lines.

Class umm.digiquilt.view.server.ServerGui extends JFrame implements Serializable

Serialized Fields

currentDirectory

File currentDirectory
The currently opened directory.

serverThread

Thread serverThread
The thread the server is/will be running on.

newClass

JButton newClass
The "Create New Class" button.

openClass

JButton openClass
The "Open class folder" button.

dirDisplay

JTextField dirDisplay
Displays the path of the currently open directory.

editChallenges

JButton editChallenges
The "Edit Challenges" button.

editNames

JButton editNames
The "Edit names" button.

startServer

JButton startServer
The "Start server" button.

stopServer

JButton stopServer
The "Stop server" button.

challengeWindow

JButton challengeWindow
The "Show challenge window" button.

fc

JFileChooser fc
The file chooser to use to prompt the user.
